message:
test(bootstrap): add test suites for error, phase, and workflow modules

Add ~571 lines of new tests across the fcp-bootstrap crate:

- error.rs (+144): Display tests for all 14 BootstrapError variants
  (TimeSkew, AlreadyExists, PartialState, InvalidRecoveryPhrase,
  FingerprintMismatch, Ceremony, CeremonyTimeout, HardwareToken,
  NoHardwareTokens, Crypto, Io, Serialization, Config, Internal),
  From<io::Error>, trait object compatibility, Result alias
- phase.rs (+255): is_terminal/is_resumable for all BootstrapPhase
  variants (noting Round2 is NOT resumable), description() and Display
  for all variants, serde roundtrip, detect_partial_state (genesis,
  keys, corrupt lock, no partial), remove_phase_lock idempotency,
  InitSuggestion/PartialStateSuggestion Display and equality
- workflow.rs (+172): BootstrapMode Display, BootstrapConfig builder
  edge cases (missing mode, all flags, defaults), multi-device not-yet-
  implemented error, Import mode bootstrap, force overwrite existing
  genesis, partial state detection, mode equality, detect_hardware_tokens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
